title: Four-part superimposed line directions

rule.instruction: A wall divided horizontally and vertically into four equal parts. Within each part, three of the four kinds of lines are superimposed.

restrictions: Faithful execution. The square (the 300x300mm work area) is divided into four equal quadrants. Each quadrant is filled with evenly-spaced STRAIGHT parallel lines in three of the four kinds of lines (vertical |, horizontal -, diagonal /, diagonal \), superimposed — each quadrant omits a different one (the drafter's choice). Monochrome black on white. The 16 executions vary line spacing and which direction each quadrant omits.
